message.content:
[
  {
    "idea": "Weekly Google Trends Surge In 'Home Appliance Repair' Searches Signals Bullish Consumer Discretionary",
    "family": "consumer_stress",
    "data": {
      "source": "Google Trends weekly search interest",
      "type": "api",
      "frequency": "weekly",
      "stable": true
    },
    "behavior": "An increase in DIY appliance repair searches indicates rising consumer stress on appliance replacements, boosting sales in home improvement and retail discretionary sectors.",
    "market_impact": {
      "direction": "bullish",
      "sector": "XLY",
      "rationale": "Consumers delaying appliance replacement but buying parts or services benefits discretionary retailers and specialty repair companies."
    },
    "trade_logic": {
      "entry": "Enter long on XLY if weekly Google Trends for 'home appliance repair' rises 15%+ week-over-week",
      "exit": "Exit after 3 weeks or if the search interest declines 10% from peak",
      "expected_frequency": "medium"
    },
    "expected_fire_rate": "weekly",
    "historical_backfill": true,
    "minimum_history_months": 24,
    "adapter_status": "existing",
    "trigger_sensitivity": "medium",
    "reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days": "Search interest fluctuates frequently with seasonal and economic stress factors."
  },
  {
    "idea": "Daily Spike In Google Trends Searches For 'Truck Driver Shortage' Signals Bullish Industrials",
    "family": "labor_jobs",
    "data": {
      "source": "Google Trends daily search interest",
      "type": "api",
      "frequency": "daily",
      "stable": true
    },
    "behavior": "A surge in searches around truck driver shortages suggests tightening labor supply, which often precedes freight pricing power and industrial logistics strength.",
    "market_impact": {
      "direction": "bullish",
      "sector": "XLI",
      "rationale": "Tight driver labor markets increase freight rates and benefit industrial transportation firms."
    },
    "trade_logic": {
      "entry": "Enter long on XLI when daily Google Trends for 'truck driver shortage' rises 20%+ compared to 5-day average",
      "exit": "Exit after 7 trading days or if searches drop below 5-day average",
      "expected_frequency": "high"
    },
    "expected_fire_rate": "daily",
    "historical_backfill": true,
    "minimum_history_months": 12,
    "adapter_status": "existing",
    "trigger_sensitivity": "high",
    "reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days": "Labor shortages and related news cycles frequently spike search interest."
  },
  {
    "idea": "Weekly FRED Series Jump In Producer Price Index Signals Bearish Basic Materials",
    "family": "macro_input_pressure",
    "data": {
      "source": "FRED Producer Price Index (PPI) weekly derived",
      "type": "api",
      "frequency": "weekly",
      "stable": true
    },
    "behavior": "A sudden increase in PPI signals rising input costs that compress margins for basic materials companies.",
    "market_impact": {
      "direction": "bearish",
      "sector": "XLB",
      "rationale": "Higher input costs reduce profitability in commodity and materials sectors."
    },
    "trade_logic": {
      "entry": "Enter short on XLB if weekly PPI rises by more than 0.7% week-over-week",
      "exit": "Exit after 4 weeks or when PPI growth slows below 0.2% weekly",
      "expected_frequency": "medium"
    },
    "expected_fire_rate": "weekly",
    "historical_backfill": true,
    "minimum_history_months": 36,
    "adapter_status": "existing",
    "trigger_sensitivity": "medium",
    "reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days": "PPI data often has periodic jumps reflecting commodity price shocks."
  },

    "trigger_sensitivity": "high",
    "reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days": "Labor disputes and strikes regularly generate news spikes."
  },
